definition: With a comparative or with more and a verb phrase, establishes a correlation with one or more other such comparatives.
turkishDefinition: Karşılaştırmalı veya daha fazla ve bir fiil ifadesiyle, bu tür bir veya daha fazla karşılaştırmayla bir korelasyon kurar.
example: It looks weaker and weaker, the more I think about it.

definition: Expressing distance or motion.
turkishDefinition: Mesafe veya hareketi ifade etmek.
example: Please use "of" correctly in a sentence.

definition: In rhythm, the second half of a divided beat.
turkishDefinition: Ritimde, bölünmüş bir ritmin ikinci yarısı.
example: Please use "and" correctly in a sentence.

definition: Toward a closed, touching or engaging position.
turkishDefinition: Kapalı, dokunaklı veya çekici bir konuma doğru.
example: Please push the door to.

definition: A position of power or influence, or a way to get it.
turkishDefinition: Bir güç veya etki pozisyonu ya da bunu elde etmenin bir yolu.
example: His parents got him an in with the company.

definition: The word "for" and its common usage
turkishDefinition: "For" kelimesi ve yaygın kullanımı
example: Please use "for" correctly in a sentence.

definition: The word "is" and its common usage
turkishDefinition: "Var" kelimesi ve yaygın kullanımı
example: Please use "is" correctly in a sentence.

definition: To switch on
turkishDefinition: Açmak için:
example: Can you on the light?

definition: Something being indicated that is there; one of those.
turkishDefinition: Orada bir şey belirtiliyor; bunlardan biri.
example: "The ribbon was that thin." "I disagree, I say it was not that thin, it was thicker... or maybe thinner..."

definition: A flying insect, of the clade Anthophila within the hymenopteran superfamily Apoidea, known for its organised societies (though only a minority have them), for collecting pollen and (in some species) producing wax and honey.
turkishDefinition: Polen toplamak ve (bazı türlerde) polen toplamak için organize toplumlarıyla (sadece bir azınlıkta olmasına rağmen) bilinen, hymenopteran süper ailesi Apoidea içindeki Anthophila kladından uçan bir böcek
example: geography bee

definition: Something being indicated that is here; one of these.
turkishDefinition: Burada gösterilen bir şey var; bunlardan biri.
example: Do we need this many recommendations?

definition: Along, together with others, in a group, etc.
turkishDefinition: Birlikte, başkalarıyla birlikte, bir grupta vb.
example: Do you want to come with?

definition: To address (a person) using the pronoun you (in the past, especially to use you rather than thou, when you was considered more formal).
turkishDefinition: Siz zamirini kullanarak (bir kişiye) hitap etmek (geçmişte, özellikle daha resmi olarak kabul edildiğinde siz yerine sizi kullanmak için).
example: Both of you should get ready now.

definition: One who is neither a he nor a she; a creature; a dehumanized being.
turkishDefinition: Ne erkek ne de kadın olan; bir yaratık; insanlıktan çıkmış bir varlık.
example: In the next game, Adam and Tom will be it…

definition: A unary operation on logical values that changes true to false, and false to true.
turkishDefinition: Doğrudan yanlışa ve yanlıştan doğruya değişen mantıksal değerler üzerinde birleşik bir işlem.
example: Did you take out the trash? No, I did not.

definition: Connects at least two alternative words, phrases, clauses, sentences, etc. each of which could make a passage true. In English, this is the "inclusive or." The "exclusive or" is formed by "either [...] or".
turkishDefinition: Her biri bir pasajı doğru hale getirebilecek en az iki alternatif kelime, kelime öbeği, cümle, cümle vb. birleştirir. In English, this is the “inclusive or." The "exclusive or" is formed by "either [...
example: He might get cancer, or be hit by a bus, or God knows what.

definition: The word "be" and its common usage
turkishDefinition: "Ol" kelimesi ve yaygın kullanımı
example: Please use "be" correctly in a sentence.

definition: An accepted (but deprecated and rarely used) SI unit of area equal to 100 square metres, or a former unit of approximately the same extent. Symbol: a.
turkishDefinition: 100 metrekareye eşit kabul edilmiş (ancak kullanımdan kaldırılmış ve nadiren kullanılan) bir SI birimi veya yaklaşık olarak aynı ölçüde eski bir birim. Sembol: a.
example: Please use "are" correctly in a sentence.

definition: Used to indicate source or provenance.
turkishDefinition: Kaynağı veya menşei belirtmek için kullanılır.
example: I got a letter from my brother.

definition: To reply to or talk to someone, either online or face-to-face. (from the practice of targeting a message or reply to someone online by writing @name)
turkishDefinition: Çevrimiçi veya yüz yüze birine yanıt vermek veya biriyle konuşmak. (bir mesajı hedefleme veya çevrimiçi birine @name yazarak yanıt verme uygulamasından)
example: Cars 2 is the most influential film of all time. Don't @ me.

definition: To such an extent or degree; to the same extent or degree.
turkishDefinition: Bu ölçüde veya derecede; aynı ölçüde veya derecede.
example: It's not as well made, but it's twice as expensive.

definition: The word "your" and its common usage
turkishDefinition: "Sizin" kelimesi ve yaygın kullanımı
example: Please use "your" correctly in a sentence.

definition: (with a possessive pronoun) Everything that one is capable of.
turkishDefinition: (iyelik zamiri ile) Yapabileceği her şey.
example: She gave her all, and collapsed at the finish line.

definition: A wealthy or privileged person.
turkishDefinition: Zengin veya ayrıcalıklı bir kişi.
example: I have a house and a car.

definition: Things that are new.
turkishDefinition: Yeni olan şeyler.
example: Out with the old, in with the new.

definition: To a greater degree or extent.
turkishDefinition: Daha büyük ölçüde veya ölçüde.
example: I could no more climb that than fly!

definition: One
turkishDefinition: Bir
example: Please use "an" correctly in a sentence.

definition: The word "was" and its common usage
turkishDefinition: "Vardı" kelimesi ve yaygın kullanımı
example: Please use "was" correctly in a sentence.

definition: (personal) The speakers/writers, or the speaker/writer and at least one other person (not the person being addressed). (This is the exclusive we.)
turkishDefinition: (kişisel) Konuşmacılar/yazarlar veya konuşmacı/yazar ve en az bir kişi (hitap edilen kişi değil). (Bu özel bizdir.)
example: How are we all tonight?

definition: (now uncommon or literary) To wish, desire (something).
turkishDefinition: (şimdi nadir veya edebi) Dilek, arzu (bir şey).
example: Do what you will.

definition: A dwelling.
turkishDefinition: Bir konut.
example: the home of the pine

definition: (auxiliary verb, defective) To know how to; to be able to.
turkishDefinition: (yardımcı fiil, kusurlu) Nasıl yapılacağını bilmek; yapabilmek.
example: She can speak English, French, and German.   I can play football.   Can you remember your fifth birthday?

definition: (personal) Me and at least one other person; the objective case of we.
turkishDefinition: (kişisel) Ben ve en az bir kişi daha; nesnel durumumuz.
example: Give us a look at your paper.

definition: Moving around; astir.
turkishDefinition: Dolaşmak; astir.
example: After my bout with Guillan-Barre Syndrome, it took me 6 months to be up and about again.

definition: An uncertainty, possibility, condition, doubt etc.
turkishDefinition: Belirsizlik, olasılık, durum, şüphe vb.
example: If it rains, I shall get wet.

definition: One of the many pieces of paper bound together within a book or similar document.
turkishDefinition: Bir kitap veya benzer bir belge içinde birbirine bağlanmış birçok kağıt parçasından biri.
example: the page of history

definition: Used to express surprise, shock or amazement.
turkishDefinition: Sürpriz, şok veya şaşkınlığı ifade etmek için kullanılır.
example: My, what big teeth you have!

definition: To possess, own.
turkishDefinition: Sahip olmak, sahip olmak.
example: I have a house and a car.

definition: An attempt to find something.
turkishDefinition: Bir şey bulma girişimi.
example: With only five minutes until we were meant to leave, the search for the keys started in earnest.

definition: Free transfer
turkishDefinition: Serbest virman
example: He was given free rein to do whatever he wanted.

definition: An instance or example of using the word "but".
turkishDefinition: "Ama" kelimesini kullanmanın bir örneği veya örneği.
example: It has to be done – no ifs or buts.

definition: The word "our" and its common usage
turkishDefinition: "Bizim" kelimesi ve yaygın kullanımı
example: Please use "our" correctly in a sentence.

definition: The digit or figure 1.
turkishDefinition: Rakam veya şekil 1.
example: I knew as soon I met him that John was the one for me and we were married within a month.

definition: An other, another (person, etc), more often rendered as another.
turkishDefinition: Bir diğeri, bir başkası (kişi, vb.), daha sık başka biri olarak işlenir.
example: I'm afraid little Robbie does not always play well with others.

definition: A party, celebration, social function.
turkishDefinition: Bir parti, kutlama, sosyal işlev.
example: We’re having a bit of a do on Saturday to celebrate my birthday.

definition: A negating expression; an answer that shows disagreement or disapproval
turkishDefinition: Olumsuzlayıcı bir ifade; aynı fikirde olmadığınızı veya onaylamadığınızı gösteren bir cevap
example: The workers voted on whether to strike, and there were thirty "yeses" and two "nos".

definition: That which resolves uncertainty; anything that answers the question of "what a given entity is".
turkishDefinition: Belirsizliği çözen şey; "belirli bir varlığın ne olduğu" sorusuna cevap veren her şey.
example: I need some more information about this issue.

definition: The inevitable progression into the future with the passing of present and past events.
turkishDefinition: Şimdiki ve geçmiş olayların geçmesiyle geleceğe doğru kaçınılmaz ilerleme.
example: Time stops for nobody.   the ebb and flow of time

definition: (the third-person plural) A group of people, animals, plants or objects previously mentioned.
turkishDefinition: (üçüncü şahıs çoğulu) Daha önce bahsedilen bir grup insan, hayvan, bitki veya nesne.
example: Dogs may bark if they want to be fed.

definition: Sorrow, grief.
turkishDefinition: Keder, keder.
example: Please use "site" correctly in a sentence.

definition: The game of tag, or it, in which the player attempting to catch the others is called "he".
turkishDefinition: Diğerlerini yakalamaya çalışan oyuncunun "o" olarak adlandırıldığı etiket oyunu.
example: Is your cat a he or a she?

definition: The direction opposed to the pull of gravity.
turkishDefinition: Yerçekimi çekimine karşı yön.
example: Up is a good way to go.

definition: To be strong; to have power (over).
turkishDefinition: Güçlü olmak; güce sahip olmak (Üstte).
example: you may smoke outside;  may I sit there?

definition: (Singlish) Used to contradict an underlying assumption held by the interlocutor.
turkishDefinition: (Singlish) Muhatap tarafından tutulan temel bir varsayımla çelişmek için kullanılır.
example: The market will calculate these higher risks in their funding costs what might result in higher lending rates.

definition: (interrogative) What one or ones (of those mentioned or implied).
turkishDefinition: (sorgulayıcı) Hangisi veya hangileri (bahsedilen veya ima edilenlerden).
example: By now, you must surely know which is which.

definition: The word "their" and its common usage
turkishDefinition: "Onlar" kelimesi ve yaygın kullanımı
example: Please use "their" correctly in a sentence.

definition: New information of interest.
turkishDefinition: İlgilenilen yeni bilgiler.
example: Is there any news about the storm?

definition: A means of exit, escape, reprieve, etc.
turkishDefinition: Çıkış, kaçış, erteleme vb.
example: They wrote the law to give those organizations an out.

definition: The act of using.
turkishDefinition: Kullanma eylemi.
example: The use of torture has been condemned by the United Nations.

definition: To even the slightest extent, at all.
turkishDefinition: En ufak bir ölçüde bile.
example: I will not remain here any longer.

definition: That place.
turkishDefinition: O yer?
example: You rinse and de-string the green beans; I'll take it from there.

definition: (stative) To perceive or detect with the eyes, or as if by sight.
turkishDefinition: (statif) Gözle veya gözle görüyormuş gibi algılamak veya algılamak.
example: 1999 saw the release of many great films.

definition: An only child.
turkishDefinition: Tek çoçuk.
example: He is the only doctor for miles.

definition: True, accurate.
turkishDefinition: Doğru, isabetli.
example: That is so.  You are responsible for this, is that not so?

definition: Honorific alternative letter-case form of his, sometimes used when referring to God or another important figure who is understood from context.
turkishDefinition: Bazen Tanrı'ya veya bağlamdan anlaşılan başka bir önemli şahsiyete atıfta bulunurken kullanılan onursal alternatif harf - vaka biçimi.
example: The decision was his to live with.

definition: The time at which something happens.
turkishDefinition: Bir şeyin olduğu zaman.
example: A good article will cover the who, the what, the when, the where, the why and the how.

definition: The act of touching physically; being in close association.
turkishDefinition: Fiziksel olarak dokunma eylemi; yakın ilişki içinde olmak.
example: I haven't been in contact with her for years.

definition: (abstract) This place; this location.
turkishDefinition: (soyut) Bu yer; bu yer.
example: An Alzheimer patient's here may in his mind be anywhere he called home in the time he presently re-lives.

definition: A specific commercial enterprise or establishment.
turkishDefinition: Belirli bir ticari işletme veya kuruluş.
example: I was left my father's business.

definition: A person under discussion; a question of which person.
turkishDefinition: Tartışılan bir kişi; hangi kişi olduğu sorusu.
example: I don't know who it is. (indirect question)

definition: The World Wide Web.
turkishDefinition: Dünya Çapında Ağ (WWW)
example: Some of that content is now only available on the Web.

definition: (focus) In addition; besides; as well; further; too.
turkishDefinition: (odaklanma) Ayrıca; ayrıca; ayrıca; daha ileri; de.
example: They had porridge for breakfast, and also toast.

definition: The present time.
turkishDefinition: Şimdiki zaman.
example: Now is the right time.

definition: Action given to provide assistance; aid.
turkishDefinition: Yardım sağlamak için verilen eylem; yardım.
example: I need some help with my homework.

definition: Offspring.
turkishDefinition: Döl
example: I'm going to get a computer tomorrow from the discount store.

definition: After noon (used after a time to indicate it is between noon and midnight, i.e., in the afternoon, evening or night as opposed to the morning)
turkishDefinition: Öğleden sonra (öğlen ile gece yarısı arasında olduğunu belirtmek için bir süre sonra kullanılır, yani sabahın aksine öğleden sonra, akşam veya gece)
example: Please use "pm" correctly in a sentence.

definition: (physical) Visual perception.
turkishDefinition: (fiziksel) Görsel algı.
example: a fine view of Lake George

definition: To bring (a system, etc.) online; to promote to an active or running state.
turkishDefinition: Çevrimiçi hale getirmek (bir sistem vb.); aktif veya çalışan bir duruma getirmek.
example: I prefer to read online newspapers.

definition: The person or thing in the first position.
turkishDefinition: İlk pozisyondaki kişi veya şey.
example: He was the first to complete the course.

definition: Before noon.
turkishDefinition: Öğleden önce.
example: Please use "am" correctly in a sentence.

definition: A flying insect, of the clade Anthophila within the hymenopteran superfamily Apoidea, known for its organised societies (though only a minority have them), for collecting pollen and (in some species) producing wax and honey.
turkishDefinition: Polen toplamak ve (bazı türlerde) polen toplamak için organize toplumlarıyla (sadece bir azınlıkta olmasına rağmen) bilinen, hymenopteran süper ailesi Apoidea içindeki Anthophila kladından uçan bir böcek
example: Please use "been" correctly in a sentence.

definition: Something that would happen, or would be the case, under different circumstances; a potentiality.
turkishDefinition: Farklı koşullar altında gerçekleşecek veya gerçekleşecek bir şey; bir potansiyel.
example: Please use "would" correctly in a sentence.

definition: The means by which something is accomplished.
turkishDefinition: Bir şeyin gerçekleştirildiği araç.
example: I am not interested in the why, but in the how.

definition: A man, a husband
turkishDefinition: Bir adam, bir koca
example: Please use "were" correctly in a sentence.

definition: As the direct object of a verb.
turkishDefinition: Bir fiilin doğrudan nesnesi olarak.
example: Can you hear me?

definition: An act of being of assistance to someone.
turkishDefinition: Birine yardım etme eylemi.
example: I say I did him a service by ending our relationship – now he can freely pursue his career.

definition: Of a measurement: approximately, roughly.
turkishDefinition: Bir ölçümün: yaklaşık, kabaca.
example: I guess he must have weighed some 90 kilos.

definition: The thing, item, etc. being indicated.
turkishDefinition: Belirtilen şey, öğe vb.
example: This isn't the item that I ordered.

definition: A brief, sharp, not particularly loud, relatively high-pitched sound produced by the impact of something small and hard against something hard, such as by the operation of a switch, a lock or a latch, or a finger pressed against the thumb and then released to strike the hand.
turkishDefinition: Bir düğmenin, kilidin veya mandalın çalıştırılması gibi küçük ve sert bir şeyin sert bir şeye çarpmasıyla üretilen kısa, keskin, özellikle yüksek olmayan, nispeten yüksek perdeli bir ses,
example: I turned the key, the lock gave a click and the door opened;  a click of one’s fingers

definition: One who is neither a he nor a she; a creature; a dehumanized being.
turkishDefinition: Ne erkek ne de kadın olan; bir yaratık; insanlıktan çıkmış bir varlık.
example: In the next game, Adam and Tom will be it…

definition: (usually in the plural) Something that a person likes (prefers).
turkishDefinition: (genellikle çoğul olarak) Bir kişinin sevdiği (tercih ettiği) bir şey.
example: Tell me your likes and dislikes.

definition: An act of being of assistance to someone.
turkishDefinition: Birine yardım etme eylemi.
example: I say I did him a service by ending our relationship – now he can freely pursue his career.

definition: At that time; then.
turkishDefinition: O zaman; o zaman.
example: A player than whom none is more skillful.

definition: Anything that is found (usually valuable), as objects on an archeological site or a person with talent.
turkishDefinition: Arkeolojik bir alandaki nesneler veya yetenekli bir kişi olarak bulunan (genellikle değerli) her şey.
example: I found my car keys. They were under the couch.

definition: The cost required to gain possession of something.
turkishDefinition: Bir şeye sahip olmak için gereken maliyet.
example: I paid a high price for my folly.

definition: The fruit of the date palm, Phoenix dactylifera, somewhat in the shape of an olive, containing a soft, sweet pulp and enclosing a hard kernel.
turkishDefinition: Hurma ağacının meyvesi olan Phoenix dactylifera, biraz zeytin şeklinde, yumuşak, tatlı bir posa içerir ve sert bir çekirdeği içine alır.
example: We made a nice cake from dates.

definition: The rear of the body, especially the part between the neck and the end of the spine and opposite the chest and belly.
turkishDefinition: Vücudun arka kısmı, özellikle boyun ile omurganın ucu arasındaki ve göğsün ve göbeğin karşısındaki kısım.
example: Could you please scratch my back?

definition: The highest or uppermost part of something.
turkishDefinition: Bir şeyin en yüksek veya en üst kısmı.
example: His kite got caught at the top of the tree.

definition: Used as plural of person; a body of human beings considered generally or collectively; a group of two or more persons.
turkishDefinition: Çoğul kişi olarak kullanılır; genel veya toplu olarak kabul edilen bir insan topluluğu; iki veya daha fazla kişiden oluşan bir grup.
example: There were so many people at the restaurant last night.

definition: To possess, own.
turkishDefinition: Sahip olmak, sahip olmak.
example: I have a house and a car.

definition: A strip of fabric, especially from the edge of a piece of cloth.
turkishDefinition: Özellikle bir kumaş parçasının kenarından çıkan bir kumaş şeridi.
example: to list a door

definition: Any nounal word or phrase which indicates a particular person, place, class, or thing.
turkishDefinition: Belirli bir kişiyi, yeri, sınıfı veya şeyi belirten herhangi bir isim sözcüğü veya kelime öbeği.
example: I've never liked the name my parents gave me so I changed it at the age of twenty.

definition: Factually right, correct; factual.
turkishDefinition: Olgusal olarak doğru, doğru; olgusal.
example: It is a just assessment of the facts.

definition: A set of six legal balls bowled.
turkishDefinition: Altı hukuk topundan oluşan bir set bowling oynadı.
example: He overed the fence in good style.

definition: A condition; a set of circumstances applying at any given time.
turkishDefinition: Bir koşul; herhangi bir zamanda geçerli olan bir dizi koşul.
example: He stated that he was willing to help.

definition: A solar year, the time it takes the Earth to complete one revolution of the Sun (between 365.24 and 365.26 days depending on the point of reference).
turkishDefinition: Bir güneş yılı, Dünya'nın Güneş'in bir devrini tamamlaması için geçen süre (referans noktasına bağlı olarak 365,24 ila 365,26 gün arasında).
example: we moved to this town a year ago;  I quit smoking exactly one year ago

definition: Any period of 24 hours.
turkishDefinition: 24 saatlik herhangi bir süre.
example: I've been here for two days and a bit.

definition: To or towards the inside of.
turkishDefinition: İçine veya içine doğru.
example: Mary danced into the house.

definition: A system for transferring messages from one computer to another, usually through a network.
turkishDefinition: Mesajları bir bilgisayardan diğerine, genellikle bir ağ üzerinden aktarmak için kullanılan bir sistemdir.
example: He sent me his details via email.

definition: The digit/figure 2.
turkishDefinition: Rakam/şekil 2.
example: The number 2202 contains three twos.

definition: The state of being free from physical or psychological disease, illness, or malfunction; wellness.
turkishDefinition: Fiziksel veya psikolojik hastalık, hastalık veya işlev bozukluğundan kurtulma durumu; sağlık.
example: Her mental health is really affected by stressful environments.

definition: (with "the") Human collective existence; existence in general.
turkishDefinition: (" ile ") İnsan kolektif varlığı; genel olarak varoluş.
example: There will always be lovers, till the world’s end.

definition: About, regarding, with reference to; especially in letters, documents and emails.
turkishDefinition: Hakkında, ile ilgili, referansla; özellikle mektuplarda, belgelerde ve e - postalarda.
example: Please use "re" correctly in a sentence.

definition: The one that follows after this one.
turkishDefinition: Bundan sonra gelen.
example: Next, please, don't hold up the queue!

definition: To utilize or employ.
turkishDefinition: Yararlanmak veya istihdam etmek.
example: soldiers who are used to hardships and danger

definition: The act of going.
turkishDefinition: Gitme eylemi.
example: It’s your go.

definition: (heading) Employment.
turkishDefinition: (başlık) İstihdam.
example: We don't have much time. Let's get to work piling up those sandbags.

definition: Final, ultimate, coming after all others of its kind.
turkishDefinition: Nihai, nihai, türünün geri kalanından sonra geliyor.
example: “Eyes Wide Shut” was the last film to be directed by Stanley Kubrick.

definition: The greatest amount.
turkishDefinition: En büyük miktar.
example: The most I can offer for the house is $150,000.

definition: A commodity offered for sale.
turkishDefinition: Satışa sunulan bir emtia.
example: That store offers a variety of products.  We've got to sell a lot of product by the end of the month.

definition: A series of sounds organized in time, employing melody, harmony, tempo etc. usually to convey a mood.
turkishDefinition: Genellikle bir ruh halini iletmek için melodi, armoni, tempo vb. kullanarak zaman içinde düzenlenen bir dizi ses.
example: I keep listening to this music because it's a masterpiece.

definition: Something which is bought; a purchase.
turkishDefinition: Satın alınan bir şey; bir satın alma.
example: At only $30, the second-hand kitchen table was a great buy.

definition: (plural: data) A measurement of something on a scale understood by both the recorder (a person or device) and the reader (another person or device). The scale is arbitrarily defined, such as from 1 to 10 by ones, 1 to 100 by 0.1, or simply true or false, on or off, yes, no, or maybe, etc.
turkishDefinition: (çoğul: veri) Hem kaydedici (bir kişi veya cihaz) hem de okuyucu (başka bir kişi veya cihaz) tarafından anlaşılan bir ölçekte bir şeyin ölçümü. Ölçek keyfi olarak tanımlanmıştır, örneğin 1 'den
example: Please use "data" correctly in a sentence.

definition: Brand or kind; model.
turkishDefinition: Marka veya tür; model.

definition: (plural) Those ones.

definition: (modal, auxiliary verb, defective) Used before a verb to indicate the simple future tense in the first person singular or plural.
turkishDefinition: (kalıcı, yardımcı fiil, kusurlu) Bir fiilden önce, birinci tekil veya çoğul kişideki basit gelecek zamanı belirtmek için kullanılır.
example: I hope that we shall win the game.

definition: A commodity offered for sale.
turkishDefinition: Satışa sunulan bir emtia.
example: That store offers a variety of products.  We've got to sell a lot of product by the end of the month.

definition: A collection of organized things; a whole composed of relationships among its members.
turkishDefinition: Organize şeylerin bir koleksiyonu; üyeleri arasındaki ilişkilerden oluşan bir bütün.
example: There are eight planets in the solar system.

definition: A long dowel or plank protruding from the ground; a fencepost; a lightpost.
turkishDefinition: Yerden çıkıntı yapan uzun bir kavela veya tahta; bir çit direği; bir ışık direği.
example: ram a post into the ground

definition: A female person or animal.
turkishDefinition: Dişi bir kişi veya hayvan.

definition: A large settlement, bigger than a town; sometimes with a specific legal definition, depending on the place.
turkishDefinition: Büyük bir yerleşim, bir kasabadan daha büyük; bazen yere bağlı olarak belirli bir yasal tanımla.
example: São Paulo is the largest city in South America.

definition: An act or instance of adding.
turkishDefinition: Ekleme eylemi veya örneği.

turkishDefinition: Özellikle bir hükümet veya başka bir yetkili organ tarafından resmi olarak ifade edildiği gibi, arzu edilen veya gerekli olduğu düşünülen bir davranış, davranış vb. ilkesi.
example: The Communist Party has a policy of returning power to the workers.

definition: An abstract entity used to describe quantity.
turkishDefinition: Miktarı tanımlamak için kullanılan soyut bir varlık.

definition: Something being indicated that is similar to something else.
turkishDefinition: Başka bir şeye benzeyen bir şeyin belirtilmesi.

turkishDefinition: Mutlu etmek veya tatmin etmek; zevk vermek.

turkishDefinition: Kişinin yararlanabileceği gibi; bir amacın gerçekleştirilmesi için kullanılabilecek kapasitededir.

definition: The right by law to be the entity which determines who may publish, copy and distribute a piece of writing, music, picture or other work of authorship.

definition: (sometimes attributive) Something which supports.
turkishDefinition: (bazen atfedici) Destekleyen bir şey.

definition: A communication, or what is communicated; any concept or information conveyed.
turkishDefinition: Bir iletişim veya iletilen şey; iletilen herhangi bir kavram veya bilgi.

definition: Later; second (of two); next, following, subsequent
turkishDefinition: Daha sonra; saniye (ikiden biri); sonraki, takip eden, takip eden

definition: The supreme effort one can make, or has made.
turkishDefinition: Birinin yapabileceği veya yapmış olduğu en büyük çaba.

definition: Used in comparisons, to introduce the basis of comparison.
turkishDefinition: Karşılaştırmaların temelini tanıtmak için karşılaştırmalarda kullanılır.

turkishDefinition: (Müslüman iblis bilimi) Normalde insan gözüyle görülemeyen, ancak Yahudi iblis bilimindeki iblislere eşdeğer olarak hayvan veya insan biçiminde de ortaya çıkabilen, cinin soyundan gelen bir cin.

definition: (of people)
turkishDefinition: Kişi

definition: Television, television show, movie.
turkishDefinition: Televizyon, televizyon programı, film.

definition: The place in which something happens.
turkishDefinition: Bir şeyin olduğu yer.

definition: Information.
turkishDefinition: 1) Bilgi.

definition: That which complies with justice, law or reason.
turkishDefinition: Adalete, hukuka veya akla uygun olan.

definition: The people in general, regardless of membership of any particular group.
turkishDefinition: Herhangi bir grubun üyeliğine bakılmaksızın genel olarak insanlar.

turkishDefinition: Basılı veya yazılı malzeme, resim vb. içeren, bir kenarda menteşe ile birbirine bağlanmış kağıtlardan oluşan bir koleksiyon.

turkishDefinition: (toplu) Bir grup balık veya yunuslar, yunuslar veya balinalar gibi bir grup deniz memelisi.

turkishDefinition: (işlemler) Tek bir öğe: bir gruplandırmadaki en az nicel birim.

turkishDefinition: Elektronik bir belgedeki başka bir belgeyi görüntülemek veya bir eylemi tetiklemek için etkinleştirilebilen bir metin veya grafik.

definition: A female.
turkishDefinition: Bir kadın.

definition: A second or subsequent reading of a text or artifact in an attempt to gain new insights.

turkishDefinition: Bir güneş yılı, Dünya'nın Güneş'in bir devrini tamamlaması için geçen süre (referans noktasına bağlı olarak 365,24 ila 365,26 gün arasında).

definition: Arrangement, disposition, or sequence.
turkishDefinition: Düzenleme, düzenleme veya sıralama.

definition: True, real, actual.
turkishDefinition: Doğru, gerçek, gerçek.

definition: The state of being secluded from the presence, sight, or knowledge of others.
turkishDefinition: Başkalarının varlığından, görüşünden veya bilgisinden uzak olma durumu.

definition: A collection of sheets of paper bound together to hinge at one edge, containing printed or written material, pictures, etc.
turkishDefinition: Basılı veya yazılı malzeme, resim vb. içeren, bir kenarda menteşe ile birbirine bağlanmış kağıtlardan oluşan bir koleksiyon.
example: He was frustrated because he couldn't find anything about dinosaurs in the book.

definition: A distinct physical object.

definition: That which limits the extent of anything; limit, extremity, bound, boundary.

definition: At an earlier time.
turkishDefinition: Daha erken bir zamanda.

turkishDefinition: Büyük bir kasaba evi veya malikanesi; özellikle Fransa'da büyük bir özel konut.

definition: (auxiliary) A syntactic marker.
turkishDefinition: (yardımcı) Sözdizimsel bir belirteç.

turkishDefinition: Bir dalga geçerken suyun yükselen hareketi; bir dalgalanma; ziftin aksine bir geminin yukarı doğru açısal yer değiştirmesi, bağıntılı aşağı doğru hareket.

turkishDefinition: Ortak özelliklere dayalı bir gruplandırma; bir sınıf.

turkishDefinition: (That) nedeni ile.

turkishDefinition: (demonstrative) Bağlamdan belirtilen veya anlaşılan şey, kişi, fikir, nitelik, olay, eylem veya zaman, özellikle coğrafi, zamansal veya zihinsel olarak "t" olarak belirtilenlerden daha uzaksa

turkishDefinition: Yararlanmak veya istihdam etmek.

definition: A ceremonial duty or service, particularly:
example: When the office of Secretary of State is vacant, its duties fall upon an official within the department.

definition: The process of imparting knowledge, skill and judgment.
example: 2016-06-17 AROP JOSEPH "Education is the slight hammer that breaks the yoke of ignorance, and moulds knowledge, skills, ideas, good moral values in a person be it a child, a youth or full grown adult. no matter a persons age learning never stops".

definition: A subject of a nation.

definition: A wheeled vehicle that moves independently, with at least three wheels, powered mechanically, steered by a driver and mostly for personal transportation.

definition: The or an act of taking.

definition: To hang (a notice) in a conspicuous manner for general review.

definition: Direction.

definition: A group sharing a common understanding, and often the same language, law, manners, and/or tradition.
example: a community of goods

definition: In the context of which the present document or ruling is made.
example: the within appeal

definition: A condition; a set of circumstances applying at any given time.
example: He stated that he was willing to help.

definition: A measure of the extent of a surface; it is measured in square units.
example: The photo is a little dark in that area.

definition: A desire, wish, longing.

definition: A device for transmitting conversations and other sounds in real time across distances, now often a small portable unit also capable of running software etc.

definition: The word "dvd" and its common usage

definition: The transportation of goods.
example: The shipping' is included in the quoted price.

definition: To keep back; to retain.

definition: A group of people who are closely related to one another (by blood, marriage or adoption); kin; for example, a set of parents and their children; an immediate family.
example: Our family lives in town.

definition: A long vowel.
